title: Vegan Latkes with JUST Egg
author: Lenny Teytelman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bas3iegn
materials: Peel and wash 2.5 pounds, russet potatoes .
Line a plate with paper towels.
Serve warm. Eat them with vegan sour cream.

steps.title: In a large mixing bowl mix...
steps.instruction: In a large mixing bowl mix the grated potatoes and onions with 1 teaspoon, of salt , 0.25 cup, flour , and 0.25 cup, JUST Egg .

steps.title: Cut up and grate the potatoes...
steps.instruction: Cut up and grate the potatoes and 1 X, small yellow onion . Either with a food processor fitted with a grater disc or just with a box grater.

steps.title: Cover bottom of a frying pan...
steps.instruction: Cover bottom of a frying pan with oil and heat to medium-high.

steps.title: Use a spoon to remove the water
steps.instruction: Use a spoon to remove the water. Put the spoon onto the surface of the batter, pressing it down a little bit. Let the liquid seep in.

steps.title: Flip, add more oil, and fry another 3-5 minutes
steps.instruction: Flip, add more oil, and fry another 3-5 minutes. 00:03:00

steps.title: If little kids are helping fry,...
steps.instruction: If little kids are helping fry, be careful with dropping the batter onto the skillet as the oil can splash. Once the oil is hot, roll ¼ cup of the fritter mixture into a ball and place itinto the oil using a fish spatula or slotted spoon.

steps.title: Transfer to the paper towel-lined plate
steps.instruction: Transfer to the paper towel-lined plate.
